final_prompt.prompt:
Use case: photorealistic-natural
Asset type: editorial photo, magazine cover
Primary request: ultra-wide-angle landscape of Emperor penguins marching across Antarctic sea ice with massive blue glacier backdrop under midnight sun
Scene/backdrop: Ross Ice Shelf region, Antarctica, vast blue glacier with ice crevasses, distant icebergs floating on calm polar sea
Subject: hundreds of Emperor penguins in formation on sea ice, foreground close-up of several adults showing black-and-white plumage and orange-yellow beak details, chicks huddled at parents' feet
Style/medium: National Geographic documentary photography, photorealistic, true-to-life color reproduction
Composition/framing: ultra-wide-angle, foreground penguin detail + mid-ground marching colony + background glacier and icebergs, expansive depth
Lighting/mood: midnight sun low on horizon, pale golden polar sky, ethereal cool-warm color interplay, soft diffused polar light
Color palette: glacier blues (light to deep sapphire), ice crevasse glow, pale gold sky, black-white-orange penguin plumage
Materials/textures: crystalline ice with layered blue tones, smooth glossy feathers with fine detail, reflective calm water
Constraints: maintain realistic color accuracy, preserve the epic scale and fragility of polar ecosystem
Avoid: oversaturated colors, artificial sharpening, deformed animal anatomy, watermark, plastic-looking ice
